name: TestJoinDiagVariantIdentificationCompleted
title: TestJoinDiagVariantIdentificationCompleted
description: Adds an event to the set of joined events that will fire when the variant identification started for the given ECU is completed.

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: The event will fire on the completion of the variant identification for this ECU.

return:
Number of conditions in stock:
-100: Input parameter error, i.e. the variant identification is not running for this ECU.
-3: Error while adding the specified event to the set of joined events.
-1: General error, for example, functionality is not available.
>0: Number of the newly joined event.
